title: Easter Plastic Reusable Food Serving Tray - Bunny & Chick Design - Happy Easter Buffet Party Serveware - Rectangular, Reddish-Magenta
features: This Easter, make sure you leave a carrot for the Easter bunny on this “Happy Easter” Spring plastic reusable plate.
Having an Easter Party, then this plate is a great way to present and serve food and snacks to guests, simply wipe down when finished and use again for next year.

Each plate comes with an adorable design features including a bunny and chick design printed upon the plastic plate. Each tray is made from durable Polypropylene plastic making it easy to clean and reuse next Easter
